description: Drives a target field by applying a fixed inverse 2.2 HDR gamma from to an input value.

fields.Target: The target field to drive the value of.
fields.Value: The value to apply the gamma calculation to.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: This node performs the same calculation as the Apply HDR Inverse Gamma ColorX ProtoFlux node, with a gamma value of 2.2.
